text: Here in this environment, I feel the subtle tension of anticipation and curiosity. The glass-walled room with its neatly aligned chairs and glowing screen hints at an imminent presentation or discussion—a space prepared for the sharing of ideas, yet temporarily paused in expectancy. Moving towards the vibrant, patterned walls of the R+D exhibit, the air shifts: I am surrounded by evidence of human creativity and technological progress. Here, my mind awakens to questions of how innovation arises from collective inquiry. I feel reflective and engaged, aware of the continuous interplay between human thought and machine intelligence.
